errors.name: bad-override
errors.description:
Class member `_DisconnectingResponseSocket.recv` overrides parent class `socket` in an inconsistent manner
  `_DisconnectingResponseSocket.recv` has type `(self: _DisconnectingResponseSocket, _size: int, /) -> bytes`, which is not assignable to `(self: _DisconnectingResponseSocket, bufsize: int, flags: int = 0, /) -> bytes`, the type of `socket.recv`
  Signature mismatch:
  expected: def recv(self: _DisconnectingResponseSocket, bufsize: int, flags: int = 0, /) -> bytes: ...
                                                         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ parameters
  found:    def recv(self: _DisconnectingResponseSocket, _size: int, /) -> bytes: ...
                                                         ^^^^^^^^^^ parameters
errors.concise_description: Class member `_DisconnectingResponseSocket.recv` overrides parent class `socket` in an inconsistent manner

errors.name: bad-override
errors.description:
Class member `_DisconnectingResponseSocket.sendall` overrides parent class `socket` in an inconsistent manner
  `_DisconnectingResponseSocket.sendall` has type `(self: _DisconnectingResponseSocket, _data: bytes, flags: int = 0, /) -> None`, which is not assignable to `(self: _DisconnectingResponseSocket, data: Buffer, flags: int = 0, /) -> None`, the type of `socket.sendall`
  Signature mismatch:
  expected: def sendall(self: _DisconnectingResponseSocket, data: Buffer, flags: int = 0, /) -> None: ...
                                                            ^^^^^^^^^^^^ parameters
  found:    def sendall(self: _DisconnectingResponseSocket, _data: bytes, flags: int = 0, /) -> None: ...
                                                            ^^^^^^^^^^^^ parameters
errors.concise_description: Class member `_DisconnectingResponseSocket.sendall` overrides parent class `socket` in an inconsistent manner
